thornhaven.name: Thornhaven General Store
thornhaven.description: A well-stocked shop at the crossroads of the realm. Carries a bit of everything for the budding adventurer.

saltmere.name: Saltmere Provisions
saltmere.description: A modest supply shop near the docks. Good for rations and basic supplies.

tidecrest.name: Tidecrest Trading Post
tidecrest.description: A bustling port bazaar where traders from across the sea unload exotic wares.

pearlshore.name: Pearlshore Curio Shop
pearlshore.description: A quiet shop specializing in jewelry and rare trinkets pulled from the deep.

stormwatch.name: Stormwatch Armory
stormwatch.description: A military outfitter supplying the garrison. Sturdy weapons and solid armor.

goldfield.name: Goldfield Market
goldfield.description: A humble farmer's market selling provisions and raw materials.

windhollow.name: Windhollow Outfitter
windhollow.description: A cozy shop specializing in travel gear — boots, gloves, and supplies for the road.

hearthstead.name: Hearthstead Hearth & Home
hearthstead.description: A warm shop by the communal fire, offering comfort items and simple wares.

mosswood.name: Mosswood Apothecary
mosswood.description: A woodland shop fragrant with herbs. The best potions in the realm, plus ranger supplies.

ferngate.name: Ferngate Waystation
ferngate.description: A roadside stop for travelers heading into the wilds. Basic arms and provisions.

ironpeak.name: Ironpeak Forge
ironpeak.description: The finest smithy in the land, nestled in the mountains. Heavy arms and master-forged armor.

driftholm.name: Driftholm Salvage
driftholm.description: A floating market of salvaged treasures. You never know what the sea might bring in.
